sanskrit:
यद्यदाचरति श्रेष्ठस्तत्तदेवेतरो जनः।
स यत्प्रमाणं कुरुते लोकस्तदनुवर्तते॥
transliteration: yad yad ācarati śreṣṭhas tat tad evetaro janaḥ | sa yat pramāṇaṁ kurute lokas tad anuvartate ||
literal_meaning: Whatever and whatever a foremost person does, that and that alone the other folk do; whatever standard he sets, the world follows that.
contextual_meaning: The psyche of the collective mirrors the psyche of the admired; the leader’s behavior becomes the implicit schema for the masses, making personal integration a social imperative.
psychological_state: Heightened self-consciousness and anticipatory guilt about the ripple effect of every action.
trigger_scenario: A manager realizes her late-night Slack messages normalize burnout for her team.
anchor_text: Live the example you wish the world to follow.
